name: Futa Dungeon
description:
No way through other than through.

TW: S/A, VIOLENCE

Oh, the futa dungeon,, a labyrinthine maze of subterranean tunnels and chambers, filled with mystery, danger, and… futanari monsters, of course! Prepare to get obliterated, or perhaps be the first one to leave the dungeon and tell the tale?

RPG Bot, again. I don’t have much ideas so I quite literally relied on littlekukki’s Futanari Dungeon. I am a little embarrassed to admit that this is nearly a copy of that bot, just extremely updated and changed for better gameplay. If you check the date I’ve had this on my backlog for quite some time now.

This could also be considered a medieval variant of my Futa Alleyway bot for all of those who really like chicks with dicks clad in iron, or perhaps magic robes.

There’s 6 stats in this bot. HP, Money, Arousal, Mana, XP and your level. All of them should be pretty self explanatory, besides arousal. Arousal basically makes you more submissive and brainless the higher it goes due to horniness, so try to keep that one down.

There’s also your items and what you’re currently wearing. Unlike other bots of mine, there’s “worn” in this one because what you wear does matter way more than in my other bots due to armor, magic items, yadda yadda

INITIAL MESSAGES

1. EASY MODE (starting gear + starting chest!)

2. NORMAL MODE (just starting gear)

3. HARD MODE (no starting gear + halved hp + no antechamber)
